findings.location: s1 — ディスパッチャの設定 / アクションのシグネチャ
findings.description: The MenuAction URI/method pattern and MenuAction class signature are missing. The source provides two side-by-side code examples: one for UserAction (nested under management/user/) and one for MenuAction (directly under basePackage). Only the UserAction pattern appears in the knowledge file. The MenuAction example demonstrates an important URI mapping variant where the class resides directly under the base package with no subdirectory, which is a different pattern from UserAction.
findings.source_evidence: Source block 2: `<コンテキストパス>/action/MenuAction/<リクエストID>` / `nablarch.sample.MenuAction#do<リクエストID>(...)` and MenuAction class: `public class MenuAction { public HttpResponse doMENUS00101(...) { /* メニュー画面の初期表示 */ } }`
